zh.lifeSummary: 當Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief於1364年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素時，他的父親Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief40歲，母親Mary MacDonald14歲。他於1393年5月30日與Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1411年8月2日在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾哈拉福享年47歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief于1364年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素时，他的父亲Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief40岁，母亲Mary MacDonald14岁。他于1393年5月30日与Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell在苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1411年8月2日在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾哈拉福享年47岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: MacLean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLean
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Eáin, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) John’. Compare Irish McAloon and McGlone .

History: This is the name of a major Scottish clan traditionally associated with the island of Mull, which claims descent from Gille Eáin na Tuaidh (‘Gillean of the Battleaxe’), who lived in the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Hector
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name borne in classical legend by the Trojan champion who was killed by the Greek Achilles. His name (Greek Hektōr) is probably an agent derivative of Greek ekhein ‘to restrain’. It was never popular in England, but there are occasional examples from the Middle Ages. In Scotland it was used as a classicized form of the Gaelic personal name Eachann, which is composed of each ‘horse’ + donn ‘brown’. It has been moderately popular in the United States since the 1940s.

en.lifeSummary: When Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief was born in 1364, in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief, was 40 and his mother, Mary MacDonald, was 14. He married Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell on 30 May 1393, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 2 August 1411, in Harlaw, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 47, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief est né en 1364, à Duart Castle, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mary MacDonald, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell le 30 mai 1393, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 2 août 1411, à Harlaw, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief 1364 in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief 40 und seine Mutter Mary MacDonald 14. Er hat am 30. Mai 1393 in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 2. August 1411 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Harlaw, Aberdeenshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief è nato il nel 1364 nel Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Mary MacDonald, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell il 30 maggio 1393, nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 agosto 1411, nel Harlaw, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chiefが1364年にスコットランドアルグイルダアルト カストルで生まれた時，父Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chiefは40歳，母Mary MacDonaldは14歳であった。1393年5月30日にスコットランドアルグイルロチャウでMarrion Mariotta Mor Campbellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1411年8月2日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハーラウで47歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief(이)가 1364년 스컷랜드 아그이 단아르트 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary MacDonald(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1393년 5월 30일 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아w에서 Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1411년 8월 2일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 하를로에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief nasceu em 1364, em Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mary MacDonald, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell em 30 de maio de 1393, em Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 2 de agosto de 1411, em Harlaw, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief родился в 1364 г. в местности дуарт кастл, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary MacDonald, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell 30 мая 1393 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 2 августа 1411 г. в местности харлав, абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief nació en 1364, en Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Mary MacDonald, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell el 30 de mayo de 1393, en Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de agosto de 1411, en Harlaw, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
